meta.title: AutoCoder ai app builder for production teams
meta.description: AutoCoder is an ai app builder that turns natural language product ideas into production-ready web apps with React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and one-click deployment.

hero.title: The ultimate ai app builder for production-ready web apps
hero.subtitle: Describe the product you want. AutoCoder plans the stack, writes the React interface, connects backend logic, and prepares a deployable app in minutes.
hero.prompt: Build a multilingual analytics dashboard with auth, billing, charts, and an admin panel.

socialProof.label: Built for founders, agencies, operators, and developers shipping with AI

items.title: AI Team
items.description: Product manager, architect, and engineering assistance in one ai app builder workflow.

items.title: Exportable code
items.description: Build with AI, then keep control with source-code export and developer-friendly handoff.

items.title: Deploy & host
items.description: Publish to a live URL, connect a custom domain, and manage projects from Workspace.

features.heading: Everything a modern ai app builder needs to ship real software
features.description: AutoCoder combines product reasoning, full-stack code generation, and deployment automation so teams can move from idea to validated app without losing engineering control.

items.title: Natural Language to Code
items.description: Turn plain-language requirements into typed React components, App Router pages, API routes, and polished UI states.

items.title: One-Click Deployment
items.description: Preview, validate, and launch with deployment-ready configuration, environment guidance, and production checks.

items.title: Full-Stack Generation
items.description: Generate cohesive frontend, backend, database schema, authentication flows, and role-based access patterns from one brief.

items.title: Multi-language Output
items.description: Build localized product experiences with dictionary-based copy, route-aware language switching, and scalable i18n structure.

howItWorks.heading: How the AutoCoder ai app builder works
howItWorks.description: A focused workflow keeps you in control while the AI handles repetitive architecture, boilerplate, and integration work.

steps.title: Describe your idea
steps.description: Write a short product brief, feature list, or workflow. AutoCoder extracts intent, user roles, and data needs.

steps.title: AI generates the stack
steps.description: The ai app builder creates Next.js routes, React components, Tailwind styling, backend logic, and database structure.

steps.title: Deploy instantly
steps.description: Review the generated app, adjust copy or logic, and publish a production-ready build with one guided deploy flow.

templates.heading: Start your ai app builder project from a proven product pattern
templates.description: Use templates as practical launch pads for websites, dashboards, internal tools, and full-stack web apps, then customize the product with natural language.

items.title: SaaS analytics dashboard
items.description: Auth, metrics, charts, billing-ready screens, and admin workflows for a subscription product.

items.title: Internal operations tool
items.description: A secure workspace for teams to manage approvals, records, tasks, and customer workflows.

items.title: AI customer portal
items.description: A customer-facing app with onboarding, AI assistance, knowledge content, and deployment-ready UX.

blogFeature.heading: See how an ai app builder creates a food truck CRM and mobile POS workflow
blogFeature.description: This case study shows AutoCoder turning a food service operations idea into a practical CRM, inventory, queue, and point-of-sale experience for mobile teams.
blogFeature.imageAlt: Food truck CRM case study built with AutoCoder

comparison.heading: More than generic AI chat, faster than traditional no-code
comparison.description: AutoCoder combines prompt-driven creation with product structure, app architecture, hosting, and export paths so your idea can become real software.

columns.title: Generic AI chat
columns.description: Useful for snippets, but you still assemble routes, UI states, data models, deployment, and product polish yourself.

columns.title: Traditional no-code
columns.description: Good for fixed workflows, but complex apps can hit layout, logic, database, and source-code limits.

columns.title: AutoCoder ai app builder
columns.description: Describe the outcome, generate the full-stack structure, preview the app, deploy it, and export code when needed.

plans.heading: Start free, then scale your ai app builder workflow
plans.description: AutoCoder supports free and paid paths with credits for builds, publishing, and iteration. Choose the workflow that matches your stage.

items.title: Free trial
items.description: Explore prompting, app generation, previews, templates, and the first product flows before you commit.

items.title: Builder
items.description: For founders and makers turning prompts into deployable apps, landing pages, dashboards, and workflows.

items.title: Team workspace
items.description: For agencies and product teams managing multiple apps, clients, domains, and project iterations.

faq.heading: Questions about using AutoCoder as an ai app builder

items.question: What can I build with AutoCoder?
items.answer: You can build websites, web apps, dashboards, internal tools, customer portals, and other production-ready products from natural-language prompts.

items.question: Do I need to code?
items.answer: No. AutoCoder is designed for founders, operators, and developers who want AI-guided workflows, while still keeping developer-friendly control when needed.

items.question: Can I deploy and host my project?
items.answer: Yes. AutoCoder supports publishing projects to live URLs, deployment and hosting workflows, custom domains, and project management in Workspace.

items.question: Can I export source code?
items.answer: Yes. AutoCoder documentation describes source-code export so teams can move from AI-generated builds into their own engineering workflow.

finalCta.eyebrow: Build while the idea is still fresh
finalCta.heading: Start with the ai app builder built for serious product velocity
finalCta.description: AutoCoder helps founders, agencies, and internal teams turn ambitious prompts into apps that feel planned, implemented, and ready for users.

footer.tagline: AutoCoder turns ideas into production-ready apps with a developer-friendly ai app builder workflow.
